problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
